question_text: Is the training data (Nemotron-CC) pinned to a specific version / preprocessing recipe in the repo, or does the code assume the user reproduces the data pipeline independently?

evidence.snippet: The exact data split that was used for training, already pre-tokenized and pre-shuffled, is available here: https://huggingface.co/datasets/dvruette/gidd-nemotron-cc-pretok
parser.add_argument(\"--tokenizer_id\", type=str, default=\"dvruette/nemotron-cc-bpe\", help=\"Tokenizer ID for the model.\")

quick_check_verdict.notes: "The repo pins the exact training split via a published pre-tokenized/pre-shuffled HF dataset (dvruette/gidd-nemotron-cc-pretok), a committed nemotron-cc-split.txt file list, and a fixed tokenizer ID, so users are not expected to reproduce the preprocessing pipeline independently.
